basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 70 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Teaching Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 11-05-2026 on the official website of Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC). A total of 70 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 69 years of age who have MD/MS/DNB in the concerned subject or M.Sc in Health Statistics/Medical Statistics/Biostatistics/Statistics with Ph.D are eligible to apply for these Teaching Faculty vacancies. The walk-in interview process for ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS/DNB in concerned subject, M.Sc in Health Statistics/Medical Statistics/Biostatistics/Statistics with Ph.D
qualification.details: Professor: MD/MS/DNB in the concerned subject with 8 years post PG experience. Associate Professor: MD/MS/DNB in the concerned subject with 5 years post PG experience. Assistant Professor: MD/MS/DNB in the concerned subject with 1 year Senior Resident experience. Assistant Professor (Statistician): M.Sc in Health Statistics/Medical Statistics/Biostatistics/Statistics with Ph.D.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled on 25th May 2026 and 26th May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 70 vacancies for Teaching Faculty positions announced by ESIC in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts is 69 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Statistician) post is Rs. 1,27,276/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Professor post?
faq.answer: For the Professor post, candidates must have an MD/MS/DNB in the concerned subject with 8 years of post-PG experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates applying for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. The fee is applicable only for General/OBC categories.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Kolkata, West Bengal, at the ESIC facility. The exact address will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at ESIC for the Teaching Faculty positions.
